reforms.description: The Federal Council initiated a legislative procedure to reform the law on professional training, aiming to strengthen the dual apprenticeship system and introduce new vocational training options. Additionally, the establishment of Haute Écoles Spécialisées (HES) aims to provide advanced technical and commercial education, enhancing the skill level of the workforce.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening vocational training and education enhances the skill level of the workforce, which is crucial for innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into practice as of 2000.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in the vocational training system.
reforms.source_quote: In June 1999, the Federal Council embarked on the legislative procedure to reform the law on professional training of 1978.

reforms.description: The Swiss government has initiated a research project to assess the impact of increasing the retirement age, which aims to manage the rising old-age dependency ratio and its fiscal implications.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The research project aims to address fiscal challenges related to an aging population, which can have long-term economic benefits.
reforms.status_evidence: The project has been announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is significant but does not represent a major overhaul of existing policies.
reforms.source_quote: Choices in this area will depend on the results of a research project on this subject that was recently requested by the Swiss government.

reforms.description: The Swiss authorities are considering a national health policy that includes the establishment of a health observatory to coordinate and collect information on health care.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact of establishing a health observatory on economic growth is uncertain at this stage.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal is under consideration but has not yet been implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is a preliminary consideration and does not represent a significant reform.
reforms.source_quote: Currently, the Swiss authorities are considering a national health policy within a forum which brings together the various actors in the health care system.
